resetPassword.title: Set your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password to protect your account.
resetPassword.headerSubtitle: Set a strong password — you will use this every time you sign in.
resetPassword.helperText: Your password is encrypted on this device and never shared in plain text.

validation.tooShort: Your new password does not meet the requirements.
validation.missingUppercase: Password must include an uppercase letter.
validation.missingLowercase: Password must include a lowercase letter.
validation.sameAsCurrent: Choose a password different from your temporary password.
validation.failed: We could not update your password. Please check your temporary password and try again.

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself so we can personalise your experience.
completeProfile.headerSubtitle: Your details help your manager find you and tailor assignments.
completeProfile.helperText: Only your full name is required — everything else is optional.

validation.saveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

acceptTerms.title: Terms & Privacy
acceptTerms.subtitle: Please read and accept before continuing.
acceptTerms.headerSubtitle: A quick read to confirm how COPA handles audits and your data.
acceptTerms.helperPending: Review every document to unlock acceptance.
acceptTerms.scrollHint: Scroll to the bottom to accept.
acceptTerms.termsBody: By using the Comprehensive Outdoor Playspace Audit (COPA) Tool, you agree to conduct audits honestly and in accordance with the instructions provided by your project manager. You will not share your access credentials. All data you submit becomes part of the audit record and may be reviewed by your manager and platform administrators. You must not use this platform for any purpose other than conducting outdoor playspace audits as assigned.
acceptTerms.privacyBody: Your personal details (name, email, demographics) are stored securely and used only to identify your submissions within the platform. Your auditor code — not your personal name — is associated with audit records visible to anyone other than your manager. You may request correction or deletion of your personal data by contacting your project manager.

validation.noDocuments: Legal documents are unavailable. Please try again later.
validation.loadFailed: Failed to load legal documents. Please try again.
validation.failed: Failed to accept terms. Please try again.

auditorCode.title: Your auditor code
auditorCode.subtitle: This is how you are identified in all audit records.
auditorCode.headerSubtitle: Your unique identifier on every audit you submit.
auditorCode.explanation: Only your auditor code — not your name or contact details — is stored with any audit you submit. This protects your privacy while keeping records traceable for your manager.
auditorCode.helperText: You can copy this code anytime from your profile in Settings.
auditorCode.loadFailed: We could not load your auditor code. You can continue and find it later in settings.
